sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_pseudo_id)
FROM `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_20201107`
WHERE REGEXP_CONTAINS(event_name, r'user_engagement')
AND event_value_in_usd > 0
AND event_timestamp >= TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(TIMESTAMP('2021-01-07 23:59:59'), DAY) - INTERVAL 7 DAY
AND event_timestamp < TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(TIMESTAMP('2021-01-07 23:59:59'), DAY)

EXCEPT DISTINCT

FROM `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_20201107`
WHERE REGEXP_CONTAINS(event_name, r'user_engagement')
AND event_value_in_usd > 0
AND event_timestamp >= TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(TIMESTAMP('2021-01-07 23:59:59'), DAY) - INTERVAL 2 DAY
AND event_timestamp < TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(TIMESTAMP('2021-01-07 23:59:59'), DAY);

Location: None
Job ID: c11042d3-ad72-4a6d-96eb-e2cf1333ca40

sql:
WITH purchases AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    product.v2ProductName,
    SUM(product.productRevenue) AS revenue
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201707*`
  CROSS JOIN 
    UNNEST(hits) AS hit
  CROSS JOIN 
    UNNEST(hit.product) AS product
  WHERE 
    REGEXP_CONTAINS(product.v2ProductName, r'^Youtube Men\s?\'s Vintage Henley$')
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId, product.v2ProductName
),
other_purchases AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    product.v2ProductName,
    SUM(product.productRevenue) AS revenue
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201707*`
  CROSS JOIN 
    UNNEST(hits) AS hit
  CROSS JOIN 
    UNNEST(hit.product) AS product
  WHERE 
    NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(product.v2ProductName, r'^Youtube Men\s?\'s Vintage Henley$')
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId, product.v2ProductName
)
SELECT 
  op.v2ProductName,
  SUM(op.revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM 
  other_purchases op
JOIN 
  purchases p ON op.fullVisitorId = p.fullVisitorId
GROUP BY 
  op.v2ProductName
ORDER BY 
  total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1;

LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH MonthlyRevenue AS (
  SELECT
    trafficSource.source,
    DATE_TRUNC(date, MONTH) AS month,
    SUM(totals.transactionRevenue) AS total_revenue
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20171231'
    AND totals.transactionRevenue IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    trafficSource.source,
    month
)
SELECT
  source,
  ROUND(MAX(total_revenue), 2) AS max_monthly_revenue,
  ROUND(MIN(total_revenue), 2) AS min_monthly_revenue,
  ROUND(MAX(total_revenue) - MIN(total_revenue), 2) AS revenue_difference
FROM
  MonthlyRevenue
GROUP BY
  source
ORDER BY
  max_monthly_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH first_transactions AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(DATE(date)) AS first_transaction_date,
    device.deviceCategory AS device_category
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201702*`
  WHERE 
    totals.transactions > 0
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId, device.deviceCategory
),
first_visits AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(DATE(date)) AS first_visit_date
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201702*`
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId
)
SELECT 
  ft.fullVisitorId,
  DATE_DIFF(ft.first_transaction_date, fv.first_visit_date, DAY) AS days_elapsed,
  ft.device_category
FROM 
  first_transactions ft
JOIN 
  first_visits fv ON ft.fullVisitorId = fv.fullVisitorId;

Job ID: 6ac296d0-85b8-4dc5-9f1f-8629e35e83c1

sql:
WITH RevenueByTrafficSource AS (
  SELECT
    trafficSource.source,
    SUM(SAFE_CAST(hits.product.productRevenue AS FLOAT64)) AS total_revenue
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_2017*`
  CROSS JOIN
    UNNEST(hits) AS hit
  CROSS JOIN
    UNNEST(hit.product) AS product
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '01' AND '06'
  GROUP BY
    trafficSource.source
),
TopTrafficSource AS (
  SELECT
    source,
    MAX(total_revenue) AS max_total_revenue
  FROM
    RevenueByTrafficSource
)
SELECT
  rts.source,
  rts.max_total_revenue AS max_daily_revenue,
  MAX(rbs.total_revenue) AS max_weekly_revenue,
  MAX(CASE WHEN DATE_TRUNC(rbs.date, MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(TO_DATE('2017-01-01'), MONTH) THEN rbs.total_revenue END) AS max_monthly_revenue
FROM
  TopTrafficSource tts
JOIN
  RevenueByTrafficSource rbs ON rbs.source = tts.source
WHERE
  rbs.total_revenue = tts.max_total_revenue
GROUP BY
  rts.source;

GROUP BY
  rts.source;

sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date), MONTH) AS month,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(COALESCE(totals.transactions, 0)) >= 1 AND AVG(SAFE_CAST(product.productRevenue AS FLOAT64)) IS NOT NULL THEN 'purchase'
        ELSE 'non-purchase'
    END AS session_type,
    AVG(totals.pageviews) AS avg_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE 
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170401' AND '20170731'
GROUP BY 
    month, session_type;

    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date), MONTH) AS month,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(COALESCE(totals.transactions, 0)) >= 1 AND AVG(SAFE_CAST(product.productRevenue AS FLOAT64)) IS NOT NULL THEN 'purchase'
        ELSE 'non-purchase'
    END AS session_type,
    AVG(totals.pageviews) AS avg_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE 
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170401' AND '20170731'
GROUP BY 
    month, session_type;

sql:
SELECT 
    p.productSKU,
    SUM(p.productQuantity) AS total_quantity_purchased
FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201707*` s
JOIN 
    UNNEST(s.hits) h ON TRUE
JOIN 
    UNNEST(h.product) p ON TRUE
WHERE 
    REGEXP_CONTAINS(p.v2ProductName, r'\byoutube\b', 'i') 
    AND NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(p.v2ProductName, r'youtub')
GROUP BY 
    p.productSKU
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity_purchased DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH home_page_visits AS (
    SELECT
        fullVisitorId,
        hitNumber,
        page.pagePath,
        totals.timeOnSite
    FROM
        `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201701*`
    WHERE
        REGEXP_CONTAINS(trafficSource.campaign, r'Data Share')
        AND page.pagePath = '/home'
),
next_page_visits AS (
    SELECT
        fullVisitorId,
        LEAD(pagePath) OVER (PARTITION BY fullVisitorId ORDER BY hitNumber) AS nextPage,
        LEAD(totals.timeOnSite) OVER (PARTITION BY fullVisitorId ORDER BY hitNumber) AS nextTimeOnSite
    FROM
        home_page_visits
)
SELECT
    nextPage,
    MAX(nextTimeOnSite) AS maxTimeOnHomePage
FROM
    next_page_visits
WHERE
    nextPage IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    nextPage
ORDER BY
    maxTimeOnHomePage DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH monthly_data AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date), MONTH) AS month,
    fullVisitorId,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions > 0 THEN pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS purchase_pageviews,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions = 0 THEN pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS non_purchase_pageviews
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170601' AND '20170731'
    AND pageviews IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    month, fullVisitorId
),
monthly_totals AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    SUM(purchase_pageviews) AS total_purchase_pageviews,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fullVisitorId) AS num_purchase_visitors,
    SUM(non_purchase_pageviews) AS total_non_purchase_pageviews,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fullVisitorId) AS num_non_purchase_visitors
  FROM
    monthly_data
  GROUP BY
    month
)
SELECT
  month,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(total_purchase_pageviews, num_purchase_visitors) AS avg_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(total_non_purchase_pageviews, num_non_purchase_visitors) AS avg_non_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM
  monthly_totals;

sql:
WITH FirstVisit AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(visitStartTime) AS first_visit_time
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201610*`
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId
),
LastEvent AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    MAX(CASE WHEN device.isMobile THEN visitStartTime ELSE NULL END) AS last_mobile_visit_time,
    MIN(CASE WHEN totals.transactions > 0 THEN visitStartTime ELSE NULL END) AS first_transaction_time
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201610*`
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId
)
SELECT 
  f.fullVisitorId,
  DATEDIFF(
    COALESCE(l.last_mobile_visit_time, l.first_transaction_time), 
    f.first_visit_time
  ) AS max_days_between_first_visit_and_last_event
FROM 
  FirstVisit f
JOIN 
  LastEvent l ON f.fullVisitorId = l.fullVisitorId
WHERE 
  l.last_mobile_visit_time IS NOT NULL OR l.first_transaction_time IS NOT NULL;
